response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and distributed-systems exposure, but does not meet the hard requirements for this CTO role. There is no evidence of executive leadership, scaling teams from 10 to 30+, board-level communication, or production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments. Recent AI-agent work appears to be tooling/MCP code generators rather than architecting stateful, event-driven multi-agent platforms. Fintech exposure is limited to one ~15-month stint at RIDE Capital as an IC.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing advocacy
concerns: No executive or senior technical leadership experience; entirely IC roles, no evidence of scaling teams to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated/high-stakes commercial environments
Thin fintech-infrastructure depth (credit, liquidity, margin, compliance) — only one short fintech stint as an IC

key_factors.factor: Lacks executive leadership / team scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
